title: Speedy Panther 10 Pack Luxury Dog Toys for Teething Small Dogs, Puppy Chew Toys Set with Plush Squeaky Dog Toy, Ball Toy and Rope Toys, Xmas Gift for Small and Medium Dogs
features: 10 Pack Luxury Dog Toys - A Complete Set perfect for your Small Dog's Teething Needs.
Includes Plush Squeaky Dog Toys, Ball Toys, and Rope Toys suitable for Tug-Of-War and other Playtime activities.
Made of Natural Rubber, Natural Cotton, and premium materials, ensuring durability and non-toxicity.
Treat Dispenser Ball is perfect to introduce an Intelligent Training for your Dog while keeping them occupied and Relieve Boredom.
Squeaky Dog Toys adds an interactive element to your Dog's Playtime, giving them a sense of Achievement.
